rulings.Case Title: JOHN WRIGHT MILLS VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File And Serve Fourth Amended Verified Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 17, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLS Motion For Leave To File And Serve Fourth Amended Verified Complaint IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AMENDMENTS 3, 7 AND 8 ARE ALLOWED. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TO BE DEEMED FILED ON APRIL 17, 2007 AND THE ALLEGATIONS ARE DEEMED CONTROVERTED BY THE PRIOR ANSWERS OF THE PARTIES. THE REMAINING AMENDMENTS ARE DENIED. DELETIONS ARE NOT SANCTIONED AND THE OTHER AMENDMENTS ARE SURPLUSAGE. =302/PJM/AP

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER CRAIG et al VS. PAUL TUEN WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 17, 2007, LINE 9. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CRAIG, MEGAN CRAIG'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENSES 7,8,9, 21 AND 22. THESE ARE ELEMENTS OF PLAINTIFF'S CASE, NOT AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE AS TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294, THERE IS NO BASIS FOR THIS DEFENSE (23); AND AS TO DEFENSES 17 AND 24, A MOTION TO STRIKE IS THE WAY TO CHALLENGE THESE DEFENSES. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2, 3, 5, 6, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 18, 19, 20, 25 AND 26 TO ALLEGE FACTS THAT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR THE DEFENSES ALLEGED. =302/PJM/KD

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Verified Petition Of Pet. For Issuance Of A Writ Of Administrative Mandate To The Dmv Setting Aside The Suspension And Notification Of Findings And Decision Of Dec 8, 2006.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 17, 2007, LINE 15. PETITIONER NIKOLA FARATS Amended Verified Petition For Issuance Of A Writ Of Administrative Mandate To The D M V Setting Aside The Suspension And Notification Of Findings And Decision Of Dec 8, 2006 IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE IS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PETITIONER WAS DRIVING A VEHICLE UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL. =302/PJM
